allow: Bash(awk -F'"' '{total+=$4; skipped+=$6; failures+=$8} END {print "Total: " total " tests, " skipped " skipped, " failures " failures, " \(total-skipped-failures\) " passed"}')

Bash(awk -F'"' '{total+=$4; skipped+=$6; failures+=$8} END {print "✓ Total: " total " tests\\n✓ Passed: " \(total-skipped-failures\) " tests\\n✓ Skipped: " skipped " tests\\n✓ Failed: " failures " tests"}')
